title: Centered Crosshair
description: Centers the crosshair to be perfectly in the middle of the screen
body:
# Centered Crosshair Fixes the annoying bug where the center of the crosshair doesn't actually match the center of the screen. Example (Red Cross = Screen Center):
Vanilla MinecraftWith the Mod
If the crosshair is an uneven number of pixels wide (e.g. 3), it will still be offcenter but just by half a pixel. This also works with any crosshair-changing resource packs!
